columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: Foreign key reference to the product number in the product register

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: Timestamp of the price history record

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: Identifier for the user who made the price change

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT1
columns.description: Duplicate timestamp field, possibly redundant or used for specific purposes

columns.name: TERMPRISTABELL
columns.description: Indicates the term price table associated with the record

columns.name: LASTCHANGED
columns.description: Timestamp indicating when the record was last modified

columns.name: PROS_AV_TERMPRIS
columns.description: Percentage of the term price that this record represents

columns.name: FORSTE_TERMIN
columns.description: Indicates whether this is the first term in a series of terms

columns.name: VALUTA
columns.description: Code representing the currency of the price

columns.name: PRISGRUPPE
columns.description: Price group to which the record belongs

columns.name: BERITAKDATO
columns.description: Date associated with a batch or transaction

columns.name: KALK_ORDREKL
columns.description: Key used in calculations related to order keys

columns.name: KALK_VALUTAKURS
columns.description: Exchange rate used in calculations, possibly for currency conversion

columns.name: ADBRUKERID
columns.description: User ID of the admin or system user who last modified the record
